auth__signin__subtitle: 12 new voice messages from your guests are waiting for you.
auth__signin__error_generic: Sign in failed. Please try again.
auth__signin__error_turnstile: Please complete the verification challenge before continuing.
auth__signin__error_account_deleted: Your account has been deleted. Please contact support.
auth__signin__unverified_hint: We sent a verification link when you signed up. Check your inbox (and spam).
auth__forgot__error_turnstile: Please complete the verification challenge before continuing.
auth__signin__protected: Protected by 2-factor. Your messages never leave your account.
auth__signin__brand_quote: The way you look at her — like the room just got quieter.
auth__signin__brand_caption: 87 voices, 1h 42m of stories, 64 photos — held safely for you to revisit whenever you want.
auth__signup__create_account__subtitle: Free to start. Upgrade when your guest list is final — or never.
auth__signup__create_account__password_h: 8+ characters. We'll never share this — not even with your partner.
auth__signup__create_account__terms_labe: I agree to the <terms>Terms of Service</terms> and the <privacy>Privacy Notice</privacy>.
auth__signup__create_account__error_gene: Sign up failed. Please try again.
auth__signup__error_turnstile: Please complete the verification challenge before continuing.
auth__signup__brand_intro: We'll walk you through it — names, date, cover photo, URL, a plan. You can change any of it later.
auth__verify__sent_to: We sent a confirmation link to <email></email>. Click it to finish setting up your wedding book — we'll bring you right back here.
auth__verify__tip: Tip: check spam if it's been a minute.
auth__verify__page_verifying_body: Just a moment — we're confirming your email.
auth__verify__page_success_body: Email confirmed. Taking you to your wedding book.
auth__verify__page_missing_body: Open the link from the email we sent you. It includes the code we need to verify your account.
auth__verify__page_error_default: We couldn't verify this link. Try again.
auth__forgot__subtitle: Enter the email tied to your wedding book. We'll send you a link to choose a new password.
auth__forgot__sent_card: We sent a reset link to <email></email>. Check your inbox to continue.
auth__forgot__error_generic: Couldn't send reset email. Please try again.
auth__reset__subtitle: Pick something memorable. You'll use this next time you sign in.
auth__reset__missing_token: Reset link is missing or expired. Request a new one.
auth__reset__error_generic: Couldn't reset password. Please try again.
auth__oauth_callback__exchanging_body: Confirming your account with the provider.
auth__oauth_callback__missing_body: Open this page from your provider's sign-in flow, or head back and try again.
auth__oauth__error_start: Couldn't start sign-in. Please try again.
auth__signup__countdown__hint: Plenty of time to gather voices.
auth__signin__welcome__body_voices_full: Gathering <voices>{voicesCount} new voices</voices>, <photos>{photosCount} new photos</photos>, and queueing them the way you left them.
auth__signin__twofactor__body_full: We sent a 6-digit code to your phone. It expires in <timer>4:52</timer>.
auth__social__error_default: Couldn’t start sign-in. Please try again.
